name: Bluestone
description_short: StoneLocator is a national stone and tile wholesaler specializing in bluestone, flagstone, and natural stone products for residential and commercial exterior projects.
description_long:
StoneLocator operates as a leading national wholesaler of natural stone and tile products, positioning itself as a bulk supplier for both residential and commercial construction and landscaping projects. The company maintains a physical presence with shipping capabilities from multiple warehouse locations, enabling rapid fulfillment of large orders across the country. Founded as a direct-to-consumer wholesaler model, StoneLocator has built its business around offering competitive wholesale pricing that undercuts typical retail stone suppliers.

The company's product portfolio centers on exterior stone materials, with particular emphasis on bluestone and flagstone pavers available in multiple sizes and finishes. Their inventory includes Caribbean Bluestone Pavers (ranging from 12×12 to 24×30 formats), Full Color Flagstone in various thicknesses (1/2 inch to 1.5 inches), Blue Select Bluestone options, and complementary products like pool coping, ledger stone panels, and natural stone tiles (granite, limestone, marble, slate, travertine, quartzite). The company also carries porcelain alternatives and luxury vinyl tile for customers seeking non-natural options.

StoneLocator differentiates through several operational advantages: a price-match guarantee promising the lowest total cost including shipping, free sample programs to allow customers to evaluate materials before purchase, bulk inventory enabling rapid order fulfillment, and multiple regional shipping locations reducing delivery times and costs. Their online platform includes visualization tools (Bath Visualizer, Kitchen Visualizer, Wall Stone Designer) to help customers plan projects. The company positions itself specifically as a wholesaler alternative to traditional retail stone suppliers, targeting both DIY homeowners undertaking larger patio projects and professional contractors and commercial builders.

As a materials supplier rather than a financial services company, StoneLocator serves a fundamentally different market than consumer finance products. Their value proposition relies on competitive pricing, inventory depth, and logistics efficiency rather than credit or lending products. Customers should approach this as a wholesale supplier for material purchasing rather than any form of financial assistance or credit service.
services: Caribbean Bluestone Pavers in multiple sizes (12×12, 18×18, 16×24, 18×24, 24×24, 18×30, 18×36, 24×30)
Full Color Flagstone Random Pattern pavers in various thicknesses (1/2 inch, 1 inch, 1.5 inches)
Blue Select Bluestone 1-inch and 1/2-inch options in multiple dimensions
Natural stone tiles including Granite, Limestone, Marble, Slate, Travertine, and Quartzite
Ledger Stone Panels for wall applications
Pool Coping products in both natural stone and porcelain
Porcelain Pavers and Porcelain Tiles as alternatives to natural stone
Stone and Glass Mosaic options including Pebblestone and Glass Tile Blends
Trim products (Bull Nose Trim, Chair Rail Trim) for finishing applications
Free sample program for product evaluation
Online visualization tools (Bath Visualizer, Kitchen Visualizer, Wall Stone Designer) for project planning
pros: Price-match guarantee including shipping costs, promising lowest total cost versus online competitors
Free sample program allowing customers to evaluate stone quality and color before purchasing full orders
Multiple warehouse locations enabling faster shipping and reduced delivery costs across different regions
Extensive product inventory with 48+ bluestone and flagstone paver options in various sizes and finishes
Online visualization tools (Bath Visualizer, Kitchen Visualizer, Wall Stone Designer) for project planning
Bulk wholesale pricing accessible directly to consumers without contractor markup
Serves both residential and commercial projects with scalable order fulfillment capabilities
cons: Currently miscategorized as a payday-alternative lender when the company is actually a building materials wholesaler with no lending or financial services component
No information provided regarding shipping timeframes, order minimums, or delivery policies on the website
Limited customer service details—only a phone number (800) 645-9066 and generic contact form available; no live chat, email support details, or response time guarantees listed
Website content focuses on product catalog with minimal information about company background, credentials, or how long they've operated
No transparency regarding material sourcing, quality certifications, or warranty information for natural stone products
best_for: Homeowners planning large patio, pool deck, or landscape projects seeking wholesale pricing on natural stone
Professional contractors and landscaping companies sourcing bulk stone materials for multiple residential or commercial jobs
Commercial developers and builders requiring consistent sourcing and competitive pricing for exterior stone cladding and hardscape materials
DIY enthusiasts with significant exterior projects (patios, walkways, pool surrounds) who want to purchase materials directly at wholesaler rates
diagnosis: StoneLocator is a building materials wholesaler, not a financial services or lending company, and should not be categorized as a payday-alternative lender. This company is best suited for homeowners and contractors seeking wholesale pricing on natural stone and tile materials for construction and landscaping projects. The primary caveat is that this is purely a product supplier with no lending, credit, or financial service component whatsoever—it serves an entirely different market than consumer finance companies.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
